sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
After pressing UP, the white center moved up by 3 rows from (27, 21) to (24, 21). The yellow cross moved up by 3 rows. Let me check what changed. The yellow cross was at (27, 21) and now it's at (24, 21). The white center is now at (24, 21). So UP moves the yellow cross up by 3 rows, the yellow cross and the white center moved up by 3 rows. The blue cross stayed at (27, 21). So the white center is now at (24, 21). The yellow cross's center is now at (24, 21). So UP moves the yellow cross up by 3 rows. The blue cross body (id 20, b, 53 pixels) is still at the old position.
So SPACE teleported the white center to the yellow cross's position. After that, UP moves the yellow cross (with the white center) up by 3 rows. The blue cross body stayed at the old position.
Let me check what changed.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after UP
prev_nodes = previous_frame.segmentation['nodes']
curr_nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
prev_hashes = {n['hash']: n for n in prev_nodes}
curr_hashes = {n['hash']: n for n in curr_nodes}
prev_h = set(prev_hashes.keys())
curr_h = set(curr_hashes.keys())
for h in prev_h & curr_h:
    prev_b = prev_hashes[h]['boundary']
    curr_b = curr_hashes[h]['boundary']
    if prev_b != curr_b:
        print("Moved:", h, prev_b, "->", curr_b)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.content:
After UP, the yellow cross moved up by 3 rows. The white center (a57e9c94faa522e9) moved from (27, 21) to (24, 21). The yellow cross parts of the yellow cross moved up by 3 rows. The blue cross body (id 20, b, 53 pixels) is still at the old position. So the yellow cross and white center moved up by 3 rows. The blue cross body stayed. So SPACE teleported the white center to the yellow cross's position, and now UP moves the yellow cross (with the white center) up by 3 rows. The blue cross body stayed at the old position.
Let me understand the game mechanics:
1. Initially, the blue cross (blue) is movable with UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT. After SPACE, the white center teleported the white center to the yellow cross's position. Now UP moves the yellow cross (with the white center) up by 3 rows. The blue cross body stayed at the old position.
So SPACE teleported the white center to the yellow cross's position. Now UP moves the yellow cross (with the white center) up by 3 rows. The blue cross body stayed at the old position.
Let me think about the game mechanics:
1. Initially, the blue cross (blue) is movable with UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT.
2. SPACE teleports the white center to the yellow cross's position.
3. After SPACE, the yellow cross (with the white center) is now movable with UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT.
4. The blue cross body stays at the old position.
So the goal might be to move the yellow cross to collect the yellow targets. Or maybe the goal is to move the yellow cross to overlap with the blue targets.
Let me try pressing SPACE again to see if the yellow cross moves. Let me try pressing SPACE again to see if it teleports back to the blue cross.
